title: CKD Nutritional Recommendations for Peritoneal Dialysis
summary: This document provides nutritional recommendations for patients undergoing peritoneal dialysis with stage 5 CKD. It advises a daily energy intake of 30-35 Kcal/Kg Ideal Body Weight (IBW) to maintain IBW and nitrogen balance, potentially reduced in the elderly or less active individuals. Protein intake should be 1-1.2 g/Kg IBW daily, with at least 50% High Biological Value protein, to meet increased requirements due to PD. Serum potassium should be maintained between 3.5-5.5 mmol/L, and serum phosphate between 1.1-1.7 mmol/L. Phosphate binders like calcium acetate or calcium carbonate may be needed. The document also outlines the need for regular dietitian assessment and review for all PD patients.
